meta.intent: Make the safer upper puppy tempting while the lower puppy is the correct water-priority rescue.
meta.expectedPath: Ignore the nearly open upper puppy, break the lower route tax, open the lower puppy before water tightens, then finish the easy upper rescue.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player cashes the easy upper rescue first and gives the lower route too little water margin.
meta.whatItProves: Water-order priority can beat an emotionally tempting easy rescue without making the mistake feel cruel.
meta.notes: Role: choice. Ice is light future-value texture near the lower lane; it should not become the primary puzzle.
